ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wire_types" (
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wire type */,
  "awg_size" INTEGER /* American Wire Gauge (AWG) size of the wire */,
  "conductor_stranding" TEXT /* Stranding configuration of the conductor */,
  "nominal_insulation_thickness" REAL /* Nominal thickness of the insulation in inches */,
  "nominal_od" REAL /* Nominal outer diameter of the wire in inches */,
  "approximate_weight_per_feet" REAL /* Approximate weight of the wire per foot in pounds */,
  "sae_specification" TEXT /* SAE (Society of Automotive Engineers) specification */,
  "ford_specification" TEXT /* Ford specification */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the wire (e.g., copper, aluminum) */,
  "temperature_rating" TEXT /* Temperature rating of the wire (e.g., 125°C, 150°C) */,
  "flame_resistance_rating" TEXT /* Flame resistance rating of the wire (e.g., VW-1, FT4) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the wire type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the wire type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line where the model is assembled */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, car, SUV) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual, CVT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the line is located */,
  "line_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the production line in vehicles per year */,
  "shifts_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of shifts per day */,
  "operational_hours_per_day" REAL /* Number of operational hours per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "plant_manager" TEXT /* Name of the plant manager */,
  "plant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wire_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type used */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model using the wire */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line using the wire */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wire used in meters */,
  "date_used" TEXT /* Date when the wire was used */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_usage_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_usage_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance document */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., SAE, Ford) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the document expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type in stock */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the wire is stored */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wire in stock in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point (i.e., the quantity that triggers a reorder) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity (i.e., the quantity ordered when reordering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality inspector, procurement officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, quality control, procurement) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wire_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the wire type */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the wire type */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_versions_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wire_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type (if applicable) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of the request (e.g., new, change) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved (if applicable) */,
  "request_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_requests_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wire_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "wire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wire type (if applicable) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new request, approved request) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_wire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wire_type_id") REFERENCES wire_types ("wire_type_id")
)
